overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player walks along wet sidewalks past pedestrians with umbrellas, while futuristic vehicles pass on the multi-lane road. The scene features the distinctive teal-green lighting, megabuildings, and elevated infrastructure characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy sidewalk beside megabuilding with elevated metro track

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking past the camera
pedestrian with umbrella walking away from camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive industrial building with illuminated white 06 signage on the facade
large elevated highway or metro track structure spanning overhead
illuminated arrow-shaped directional lights attached to the elevated structure
tall modern street lamp casting bright light on the wet pavement
derelict car parked on the grassy verge beside the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, walking along a wet concrete sidewalk. The massive megabuilding_06 looms on the left with its distinctive illuminated signage, while an elevated metro structure spans overhead with glowing chevron lights. Pedestrians with umbrellas pass by in the opposite direction as the camera moves forward through the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with concrete retaining wall and passing heavy traffic

events.description: large black futuristic truck drives past on the road to the right, splashing through puddles

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the sidewalk as a large truck passes by on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: large futuristic truck driving past on the wet multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall plain concrete wall running parallel to the sidewalk
futuristic heavy-duty truck with multiple axles driving on the road

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along a section with a tall concrete retaining wall on the left. At around 18 seconds, a large futuristic truck passes by on the road to the right. The megabuilding_06 remains visible but moves further to the left as the camera progresses. The elevated metro structure continues overhead, and the chevron signs disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with neon storefronts approaching intersection

events.description: group of three pedestrians in tactical gear with red helmets comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past a group of pedestrians in tactical gear while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: group of three people wearing red helmets and tactical gear walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated neon signs attached to the concrete wall advertising businesses
white painted zebra crossing lines on the road surface
large illuminated digital advertisement screen mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete wall which now features glowing neon storefront signs. The camera approaches and passes a group of pedestrians wearing distinctive red helmets and tactical gear. The megabuilding_06 finally passes out of view behind, while crosswalk markings and a digital billboard come into view as the camera nears an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and digital signage

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing traffic and pedestrians, then continuing along the new sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible in the background
wide open intersection area with multiple crosswalks and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide urban intersection, stepping off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk. The space opens up to reveal futuristic skyscrapers in the background and multiple digital billboards. Vehicles drive through the intersection as the camera crosses to the other side, where the elevated metro structure continues to dominate the skyline overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow, enclosed sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins beneath an elevated metro structure with glowing chevron lights, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas while a massive megabuilding looms on the left. As the camera progresses, the chevron signs fade and the view shifts toward a tall concrete retaining wall, punctuated by the passage of a large futuristic truck on the adjacent road. The scene then evolves as the wall becomes lined with glowing neon storefronts and the camera passes a group of tactical pedestrians in red helmets, eventually leaving the megabuilding behind. Finally, the space opens up as the camera steps onto a crosswalk, revealing a sprawling intersection filled with digital billboards, futuristic skyscrapers, and flowing traffic under the enduring presence of the overhead metro.
